channel.title: Journal — Vitor Gabriel
channel.description: Writing on engineering, systems design, and the craft of shipping reliable software.

item.title: Portfolio projects: ideas beyond the calculator
item.description: Your portfolio won't impress anyone with a notes CRUD or calculator. Build something that solves your real problem.

item.title: Scaling Laravel without rewrite: caching, queues, read models
item.description: App got slow? Before rewriting in Go, try this: layered caching, queues for heavy jobs, read models for complex queries.

item.title: Claude's design: how Anthropic built aligned AI
item.description: Constitutional AI, honest RLHF, refusal patterns. Building trustworthy AI requires firm design, not just scale.

item.title: Claude Opus 4.7: deep reasoning in real time
item.description: Improvements in complex reasoning, context, inference speed. Viable for code generation, technical analysis, system design.

item.title: AI in software development: it's not automation, it's amplification
item.description: LLMs accelerate boilerplate. Architecture, review, judgment are still yours. Real value: 10x faster exploring.

item.title: Relational vs Non-Relational: true trade-offs
item.description: SQL: ACID, integrity, rigidity. NoSQL: flexibility, scale, risk. No silver bullet.

item.title: Why TypeScript is non-negotiable now
item.description: Types enforce validation. 15-20% overhead, 3x faster refactoring. Executable documentation.

item.title: Clean Code in 2026: pragmatism over dogma
item.description: Clean Code 2008 vs 2026: AI reads bad code for you, so shift focus. Now: auditability, decision traceability, observability.

item.title: Service Layers in Laravel 12: where does logic actually go?
item.description: Controller → Service → Repository → Model. Who does what? Controller deserializes HTTP. Service orchestrates business.

item.title: Why your ledger needs double-entry, even on day one
item.description: Double-entry isn't optional. Implementing early costs 2 hours. Retrofitting in production costs 200 hours.

item.title: Shipping Risklog: turning deploys into paragraphs
item.description: Silent deploy is risky. Risklog analyzes each diff, classifies by risk, reduced post-deploy scrambles 62%.

item.title: Attention from scratch: notes while reading the GPT paper
item.description: Built a transformer from scratch in PHP. Attention is just matrix multiplication. Code fits in 200 lines.

item.title: Multi-tenancy in Laravel: four shapes, one trap
item.description: Start with simple row-scoped. Migrate to schema per tenant when scaling. Database per tenant if compliance requires.
